title: Simple Cobble Gen
description: Makes Cobblestone as fast as you can take it.
body:
# Simple Cobblestone Generator ## Quick Intro This is a mod that adds a Cobblestone Generator... This is not a machine that makes power from cobble, but a machine that makes cobble, optionally using power. Yes, you can use this in your pack... so long as the pack, and therefore my mod, is not being sold for money. ## What Does it Look Like? It looks like this: ![Picture of the CobbleGen](https://imgur.com/s1xOrHt.png) ## How Does it Work? It produces cobble as fast as you can take it out. However, if you make it require power in the configs... then it turns into a box where power goes in and cobble goes out, speed limited only by your ability to harness it.

## How Do I Craft it? Like this: ![Recipe](https://imgur.com/xGdq4aD.png) However, that can be changed by a modpack maker. ## How Do I Make it Use Power? To make it use power, find the mod's configuration file, and change the power requirement `"RF_PER_BLOCK"` to be greater than 0. Also available on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simplecobblestonegenerator/)
